bot_not_found: 🔎 Bot not found, or you do not have access.
help.text: 🤖 BotMother Build, run, inspect, and edit Telegram bots from plain-language prompts. Choose an action below. BotMother will guide only when it needs more detail.
help.create: 🪄 Create Tap New Bot, describe what the child bot should do, answer any necessary AI questions, then paste the child token from @BotFather. Good prompt details • Admin IDs • Payment or contact info • Required buttons and screens • API keys or settings • What users should see first
help.manage: 📦 Manage Tap My Bots, then choose a bot. Each bot page includes status, logs, ask, edit, revise, restart, stop, and delete actions. You do not need to type internal IDs for normal use.
help.ops: 🧰 Operations Use each bot page for logs, status, restart, stop, and delete. Delete stops the child bot and frees its token for reuse.
help.utils: 🪪 Utilities Profile shows your full Telegram user and chat info. Health shows the manager and child-process summary. Examples gives ready-to-edit prompt ideas.
help.fallback: ⌨️ Command Fallbacks Buttons are the main interface, but Telegram commands still work when needed: /newbot, /bots, /status, /logs, /ask, /edit, /revise, /restart, /stop, /delete, /id, /health, /cancel.
examples.text: ✨ Bot Ideas Copy one, tweak it, then tap New Bot. 🛒 Shop Bot Online store bot with product catalog, cart, KPay payment instructions, order tracking, and admin notifications. Admin IDs are 123456789 and 987654321. 📅 Booking Bot Appointment booking bot for a small clinic. Users choose date/time, leave phone number, and admins can view bookings. 🎓 Quiz Bot Daily quiz bot with scores, leaderboard, hints, and admin command to add questions. 📣 Channel Assistant Bot that drafts announcements, stores reusable templates, and lets admins broadcast to subscribers. Tip: include required admin IDs, payment info, API keys/settings, and any must-have buttons up front.
empty.bots: 🪄 No child bots yet Tap New Bot to create one, or open Examples for ideas.
bots.title: 📦 Your Bots Tap a bot to open actions.
logs.empty: 🧾 No logs yet. Start or restart the bot, then open Logs again.
choose.logs_no_id: 🧾 Choose Logs Pick a bot first.
choose.ask_no_id: 💬 Choose Ask Bot Pick a bot first.
flow.expired: ⌛ This flow expired Please choose the bot again.
cancel.done: ✅ Cancelled Choose a next action below.
newbot.start: 🪄 New Bot Describe the Telegram bot you want to build.
newbot.empty_prompt: ✍️ Send a prompt Describe the child bot, or tap Cancel to abort.
newbot.more_detail: ⚠️ More detail needed Try New Bot again and include the essentials up front: • Admin IDs • Payment or contact details • API keys or settings • Must-have buttons or commands
newbot.missing_launch_detail: ⚠️ Missing launch detail Try New Bot again with the required data included up front.
newbot.token: 🔐 Final Step Paste the child bot token from @BotFather. Create a separate child bot in @BotFather, then paste only that token here. Do not use the mother bot token.
newbot.expired: ⌛ Plan expired Tap New Bot to start again.
newbot.launching: 🚀 Launching... Refining, validating, sandboxing, and starting the child bot.
ask.start_examples: 💬 Ask {title} Examples • Why did it stop? • What commands does it support? • How should I edit it to add payments?
ask.start_short: 💬 Ask {title} What do you want to know?
ask.empty: ✍️ Ask a question Tap Cancel to abort.
ask.reading: 🔍 Reading bot context... Checking latest source, status, and recent logs.
choose.none: 🪄 No bots yet Tap New Bot to create one first.
choose.ask: 💬 Choose a bot to ask about:
choose.tail: 🧾 Choose a bot to inspect logs:
source.owner_only: 🔒 Owner Only Raw source is owner-only. Use Edit Bot to change bots with a prompt.
revise.start: ♻️ Revise {title} Send the new full prompt. This regenerates the bot from scratch. For smaller changes, tap Edit instead.
revise.start_short: ♻️ Revise {title} Describe the new complete version. Use this when the bot should be rebuilt from a fresh prompt. For a smaller change, tap Edit.
revise.empty: ✍️ Send a revision prompt Tap Cancel to abort.
revise.running: ♻️ Regenerating... Refining, validating, and restarting the child bot.
edit.start: ✏️ Edit {title} Describe what you want to change. Examples • Add a help menu with examples • Make checkout ask for phone number and address • Improve error messages and admin notifications The AI may ask follow-up questions. Tap Cancel to abort.
edit.start_short: ✏️ Edit {title} Describe what you want to change.
edit.empty: ✍️ Describe the change Tap Cancel to abort.
edit.more_detail: ⚠️ More detail needed Try Edit Bot again with the missing details included up front.
edit.applying: 🚀 Applying edit... Refining, validating, and restarting the child bot.
followup.empty: ✍️ Reply with the missing details Tap Cancel to abort.
health.title: 🩺 BotMother Health
error.unhandled: ⚠️ BotMother hit an unexpected error Error ID {error_id} Try the action again, or open Help for usage examples. If this involved a child bot, the Logs button may show more context.
delete.confirm: 🗑️ Delete {title}? This stops it and frees its token.
